title: Grow Moonstones
content:
Drop seven 4-sided dice from 12-16” above the centre of the board. Leave them where they fall. The number shown is the **Depth Value**. Characters take possession via the **Harvest** action. Models may move over stones but not overlap them at the end of a move.

**Mulligan** – If unhappy with the spread, a player may request one re-drop per game.
